600cell.verdict: STRUCTURED, NOT random: only 9 distinct eigenvalues among 120 (huge multiplicities from the 2I symmetry); no GSE spacing.  beta=4 here is SYMMETRY-CLASS, not spacing.

quaternionic.symmetry_class: beta=4 (symplectic/GSE class): quaternionic Hilbert space, Sp(1)=SU(2), antiunitary J with J^2=-1 -> Kramers doubling
